headline: Can lululemon Restore Pricing Power Against Increasing Discounts?
summary: LULU works to rebuild pricing power after markdown-heavy 2025, banking on innovation, tighter inventory and full-price sales recovery into fiscal 2026.

headline: Texas AG Probes Lululemon Over ‘Forever Chemicals’
summary: The investigation will examine whether the athleticwear giant's apparel contains PFAS or "forever chemicals" that customers wouldn't expect given its wellness-focused marketing.

raw.headline: Texas AG Probes Lululemon Over ‘Forever Chemicals’

headline: NIKE's Sales Mix Shift: Wholesale Gains vs. Digital Decline
summary: NKE shifts focus to wholesale growth amid declining digital sales, betting that stronger retail partnerships can restore margins and stabilize long-term growth.

headline: Lululemon faces Texas probe over PFAS in products
summary: The CID is part of a broader inquiry into whether the company may have misled consumers about the safety, quality and health implications of its merchandise.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess Lululemon Athletica (LULU) After Its Multi Year Share Price Slump
summary: If you are wondering whether lululemon athletica's current share price reflects its true worth, the numbers behind the stock can tell a very different story from the headline price alone. The shares last closed at US$162.56, with recent returns of 5.8% over 7 days and 3.0% over 30 days, set against a year to date return of 22.9% decline and a 1 year return of 36.4% decline. These moves sit against a longer 3 year return of 56.4% decline and a 5 year return of 48.6% decline, which gives...
